title: LangGraph Crash Course - Agent Workflows in Python
summary: A crash course on LangGraph covering agent workflows in Python. Topics include environment setup, basic workflows, memory management, conditional routing, RAG integration, human-in-the-loop patterns, and graph visualization for building multi-step agentic systems.
